name: Sapropterin
notes: FDA-approved PKU therapy (BH4 form); pterin cofactor mimic

name: Tetrahydrobiopterin
notes: Natural BH4 cofactor; pterin scaffold related to NADH cofactor pocket binders

name: L-phenylalanine
notes: PKU substrate; negative control for PHGDH pocket

name: Methotrexate
notes: Pterin-containing antifolate; tests broader pterin scaffold fit

name: Folic-acid
notes: Folate cofactor; another pterin scaffold reference
